name: Buzz Lightyear
visit_reason: Severe headache on left side near temporal region

visit_history.physician_notes: Patient reports right after a flu started having severe headache on left side of the head.Occurs randomly throughout the day, with many episodes each lasting 2-3 minutes.Level 9 pain. No vision changes, no family history of migrane.Advised likely cluster headaches, recommended pure oxygen which helped and use of rizatriptan.
Severe one sided headaches on left side. Previous CT was normal. Recommended continue using pure oxygen and rizatriptan as it helped. Ordered labs and MRI.
